channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Péter Magyar vows to pursue those who ‘plundered’ Hungary after election win - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Péter Magyar vows to pursue those who ‘plundered’ Hungary after election win  The Guardian
  2. Opinion | Orban’s Fall Is an Astounding Achievement  The New York Times
  3. Opinion | The Curtain Falls for Hungary’s Orbán  WSJ
  4. Orbán’s Defeat Shows What Trump’s Opponents Keep Doing Wrong  Politico
  5. 5 things to know about Péter Magyar, Hungary's new prime minister  NPR

item.title: Hezbollah official says the group won't abide by any agreements from Lebanon-Israel talks in the US - AP News
item.description:
1. Hezbollah official says the group won't abide by any agreements from Lebanon-Israel talks in the US  AP News
  2. Israel Launches New Attacks in Lebanon, Days Ahead of Rare Direct Talks  The New York Times
  3. Arab pressure reins in Hezbollah protests ahead of Israel-Lebanon talks  The Times of Israel
  4. U.S.-Iran Cease-fire Hezbollah Leader Says Lebanon Should Avoid Israel Talks, Vows Continued Fighting  Haaretz
  5. Who is Yechiel Leiter, Israel’s US envoy leading talks with Lebanon?  Al Jazeera

item.title: Colombia to cull hippo population founded by drug lord - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Colombia to cull hippo population founded by drug lord  Al Jazeera
  2. Colombia to euthanize dozens of "cocaine hippos" linked to drug lord Pablo Escobar in bid to control population  CBS News
  3. Colombia to cull up to 80 hippos descended from Pablo Escobar zoo  The Guardian
  4. Colombia authorizes the use of euthanasia to stop the spread of Pablo Escobar’s hippos  EL PAÍS English
  5. Colombia to control hippo population through euthanasia  Reuters

item.description: IDF says close to capturing Hezbollah’s historic Bint Jbeil stronghold  The Times of IsraelView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: Leo becomes first Pope to visit Algeria at start of major Africa tour - BBC
item.description:
1. Leo becomes first Pope to visit Algeria at start of major Africa tour  BBC

  4. Pope Leo visits Algeria in sign of Africa’s growing importance to Catholic church  The Guardian

item.title: IDF says 250 Hezbollah fighters killed in minutes in April 8 strikes - The Jerusalem Post
item.description:
1. IDF says 250 Hezbollah fighters killed in minutes in April 8 strikes  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Iranian ports. And, Orbán loses Hungarian election - NPR
item.description:
1. Trump says U.S. will blockade Iranian ports. And, Orbán loses Hungarian election  NPR

  3. 'PM refuses to join blockade' and 'Hungary enters new era'  BBC

  5. AP News Summary at 9:33 a.m. EDT  thegazette.com

item.title: UK report lays bare ‘catastrophic’ missed chances before stabbings at girls’ dance class - AP News
item.description:
1. UK report lays bare ‘catastrophic’ missed chances before stabbings at girls’ dance class  AP News

item.title: Spanish premier urges China to take bigger role in multipolar order - Reuters
item.description:
1. Spanish premier urges China to take bigger role in multipolar order  Reuters

item.title: Strongest storm on planet bearing down on U.S. islands in Western Pacific - Yahoo
item.description:
1. Strongest storm on planet bearing down on U.S. islands in Western Pacific  Yahoo

item.title: The causes and consequences of Trump’s defeat - Comment is Freed
item.description:

item.title: At least 100 dead in Nigeria after air force ‘misfire’ on market, sources say - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Pope Leo and President Trump are at odds over immigration in the U.S. and the Iran war - CBS News
item.description:
1. Pope Leo and President Trump are at odds over immigration in the U.S. and the Iran war  CBS News
  2. Pope Leo’s attitude to the Iran war is shocking  The Times
  3. Pope Leo says 'delusion of omnipotence' is fueling U.S.-Israeli war in Iran  NPR
  4. Pope Leo XIV: ‘I am not afraid of the Trump administration’  EWTN News
  5. Pope Leo urges end to 'madness of war' as US, Iran start talks  Reuters
